name: Fore Seasons Golf Club
about: Fore Seasons Golf Club is an indoor golf facility located in Bethany, Connecticut. The venue operates from November through April, offering a 25,000 sq. ft. space for golfers to learn, practice, and hone their skills. It features 7 golf simulators, 20 full swing stations, 2,200 sq feet of putting green, 5,500 sq feet of chipping green, and 2 bunkers. The facility provides Trackman dual radar technology simulators and offers golf instruction through private and group lessons. Pricing is based on per-hour or per-hole simulator usage, with lesson packages also available.
why_golfers_like_it: Real golf ball and club play on simulators
Extensive practice areas including a 2,200 sq ft putting green and 5,500 sq ft chipping green
Trackman dual radar technology for accurate shot analysis
Professional coaching available through private and group lessons

simulator_hardware.notes: 5 of the 7 simulators feature Trackman dual radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you use your own clubs with real golf balls on the simulators and practice areas.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes varies but simulator rates are $25 for 18 holes or $35 per hour.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is welcoming to beginners and families, making it kid-friendly.
